needs.summary: List link payments with the internal fee split: each row shows time, business name, debtor first name, amount, combined fee, OweMe commission, processor share, and status. Fee split must be server-authoritative (the screen currently recomputes 2.5% + N100 cap N2,500 combined and 1% cap N500 commission client-side).
needs.filters/actions: Ordered newest-first; statuses settled|pending|failed; admin paged list per conventions (?page=&limit= -> {data, page, total})

needs.summary: Monthly link-payment aggregates over SETTLED payments for the current month: count of settled payments, gross settled volume, total combined fees charged, total OweMe commission kept. Currently derived client-side by filtering fixture rows on a hardcoded '2026-07' month prefix; needs a server aggregate scoped to a month parameter.
needs.filters/actions: Scoped by month; only status=settled contributes

needs.summary: List payment-processor webhook events (Paystack-style types like charge.success, charge.failed, transfer.success, transfer.failed, refund.processed) with delivery-processing outcome, plus an error count for the header subtitle.
needs.filters/actions: Filter by processed status: all | ok | error; error count surfaced as a summary figure

needs.summary: Replay a failed webhook event: re-run processing for an event whose processed state is 'error'; on success its state becomes 'ok'. UI uses a two-click confirm (Replay -> Confirm replay). Per conventions this is a support-resolvable action ('replay a webhook') and, being an admin WRITE, must record to admin_audit_log.
needs.filters/actions: Only valid for events with processed=error; idempotent replay preferred; audit-logged
